# vanta_people (Data Source)

List people, optionally filtered by employment status.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Current employees.
data "vanta_people" "current" {
  employment_status = "CURRENT"
}

output "current_emails" {
  value = [for p in data.vanta_people.current.people : p.email]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `employment_status` (String) Filter by employment status (e.g. `CURRENT`, `FORMER`, `ON_LEAVE`).

### Read-Only

- `people` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--people))

<a id="nestedatt--people"></a>
### Nested Schema for `people`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String) Display name.
- `email` (String) Email address.
- `employment_status` (String) Employment status.
- `id` (String) Person ID.
- `job_title` (String) Job title.
